narrative:
West Farmington Village (precinct in Trumbull County) has 294 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a clear Republican lean of 10.9 percentage points.
